art_style.summary: Casual, cute mobile puzzle game with a soft, tactile candy-and-chocolate aesthetic. Soft-shaded heart-shaped tiles on a chocolate-brown background.
art_style.rendering: Soft 2D flat-shaded with subtle gradients, slight rounded corners on every tile.
art_style.palette: Chocolate brown #6e4a2c, strawberry pink #f5a6c2, vanilla cream #f0e3c0, gold #f1c150

video_analysis.summary_one_sentence: 8x8 grid puzzle where the player drags shapes from a tray onto the board to clear lines for combo bonuses.
video_analysis.defining_hook: Pre-shaped pieces tray, drop on grid, simultaneous horizontal+vertical line clears for combo bonuses.

game_spec.core_loop_one_sentence: Drag tray shapes onto an 8x8 grid; clearing rows or columns scores points.
game_spec.first_5s_script: Brown background with 8x8 grid centered. Three pre-shaped tile pieces visible at the bottom in a tray. Score in top-left, high score in top-right with crown.
game_spec.win_condition: Survive — keep dropping tiles, never let the tray get stuck
